name: tick-slider
title: Tick Slider
description: Pill shell with bound labels, a tick gauge, and a floating value bubble.

api.description: Scrubber with bound labels, a tick gauge, and a floating value bubble.

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum value.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum value (required).

props.name: step
props.description: Increment between values.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled value. Values outside min to max are snapped to step and clamped for the thumb, ticks, bubble, and aria value.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial value.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called when the value changes.

props.name: startLabel
props.description: Content for the left bound label. Omit to hide the bound.

props.name: endLabel
props.description: Content for the right bound label. Omit to hide the bound.

props.name: bounds
props.description: Which bound labels to show. Hidden sides fade the tick gauge at that end. Use none to hide both labels and fade both ends.

props.name: formatValue
props.description: Formats the bubble text and aria valuetext. Defaults to String(value).

props.name: tickCount
props.description: Number of vertical tick bars across the track (minimum 2).

props.name: showTicks
props.description: Show the vertical tick bars.

props.name: tickActive
props.description: Fill color for ticks at or left of the current value. Prefer a kit color token.

props.name: tickMuted
props.description: Fill color for ticks right of the current value. Prefer a kit color token.

props.name: tickWidth
props.description: Tick bar width. Prefer a kit length token such as var(--border-width-thick).

props.name: tickHeight
props.description: Tick bar height. Prefer a kit length token such as calc(6 * var(--spacing-unit)).

props.name: tickRadius
props.description: Corner radius of each tick bar.

props.name: tickGap
props.description: Minimum gap between tick bars. Ticks still span the full track from start to end.

props.name: thumbWidth
props.description: Accent thumb width. Prefer a kit length token such as var(--border-width-thick).

props.name: thumbHeight
props.description: Accent thumb height. Prefer a kit length token such as calc(6 * var(--spacing-unit)). Overrides the sm density thumb height when set.

props.name: renderTick
props.type: (tick: { index: number; count: number; active: boolean; ratio: number; value: number }) => React.ReactNode
props.description: Replace each default tick bar with custom content for full control of each mark.

props.name: showValueBubble
props.description: Show the floating value bubble above the thumb.

props.name: bubbleLeading
props.description: Optional leading content inside the value bubble.

props.name: tickSound
props.description: Play a short mechanical tick on each stepped value change while scrubbing or using the keyboard. Skipped when the document is hidden or reduced motion is preferred.

props.name: accent
props.description: Accent fill for the thumb and value bubble. Pass a CSS color, preferably a kit token such as var(--df-blue-450).

props.name: accentForeground
props.description: Text color on the value bubble. Pass a CSS color, preferably a kit token.

props.name: boundForeground
props.description: Text color on the bound labels. Pass a CSS color, preferably a kit token.

props.name: radius
props.description: Corner radius of the outer shell.

props.name: boundRadius
props.description: Corner radius of the bound labels.

props.name: thumbRadius
props.description: Corner radius of the accent thumb tick.

props.name: bubbleRadius
props.description: Corner radius of the floating value bubble.

props.name: size
props.description: Overall density. The sm size is compact for shell, bounds, ticks, thumb, bubble, and top clearance. Containers under 22rem apply the same density automatically. Appearance props and CSS variables still override.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disabled control.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible name applied to the slider thumb.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: ID of a labeling element for the slider thumb.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the root.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles on the root. Can also override TickSlider CSS variables directly.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Appearance props map onto these CSS variables. The sm size and shells under 22rem remap base variables to the sm companion tokens. Prop and style overrides still win.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-accent
props.description: Active thumb tick and value bubble.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-accent-foreground
props.description: Bubble text and leading content.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-shell-bg
props.description: Pill shell background.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-shell-border
props.description: Pill shell border.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-shell-radius
props.description: Outer shell corner radius.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-shell-height
props.description: Minimum shell height.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-shell-pad
props.description: Shell padding around bounds and track.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-gap
props.description: Gap between bound labels and the track.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-bound-bg
props.description: Bound label fill.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-bound-border
props.description: Bound label border.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-bound-foreground
props.description: Bound label text.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-bound-radius
props.description: Bound label corner radius.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-bound-min-width
props.description: Minimum width of each bound label.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-bound-pad-inline
props.description: Horizontal padding inside each bound label.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-bound-pad-block
props.description: Vertical padding inside each bound label.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-tick-active
props.description: Ticks at or left of the current value.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-tick-muted
props.description: Ticks right of the current value.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-tick-width
props.description: Tick bar width.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-tick-height
props.description: Tick bar height.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-tick-radius
props.description: Tick bar corner radius.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-tick-gap
props.description: Minimum gap between tick bars when tickGap is set.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-thumb-width
props.description: Accent thumb width.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-thumb-height
props.description: Accent thumb height.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-thumb-radius
props.description: Accent thumb corner radius.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-bubble-pad-inline
props.description: Horizontal padding inside the value bubble.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-bubble-pad-block
props.description: Vertical padding inside the value bubble.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-bubble-offset
props.description: Gap between the thumb and the value bubble.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-bubble-radius
props.description: Value bubble corner radius.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-root-pad-top
props.description: Top clearance for the floating value bubble.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-fade-size
props.description: Edge fade length when a bound label is hidden.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-shell-height-sm
props.description: Compact shell height for size sm.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-shell-pad-sm
props.description: Compact shell padding for size sm.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-gap-sm
props.description: Compact bound to track gap for size sm.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-bound-min-width-sm
props.description: Compact bound minimum width for size sm.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-bound-pad-inline-sm
props.description: Compact bound horizontal padding for size sm.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-bound-pad-block-sm
props.description: Compact bound vertical padding for size sm.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-tick-height-sm
props.description: Compact tick bar height for size sm.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-thumb-height-sm
props.description: Compact accent thumb height for size sm.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-bubble-pad-inline-sm
props.description: Compact bubble horizontal padding for size sm.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-bubble-pad-block-sm
props.description: Compact bubble vertical padding for size sm.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-bubble-offset-sm
props.description: Compact bubble offset for size sm.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-root-pad-top-sm
props.description: Compact top clearance for size sm.

props.name: --df-tick-slider-fade-size-sm
props.description: Compact edge fade length for size sm.

props.name: --spacing-unit
props.description: Base unit for shell, tick, and bubble sizes.
